## Checklist

- [ ] One issue, one branch (`codex/ulg-<id>-<slug>`)
- [ ] Commit messages include issue id (`ULG-#`)
- [ ] PR title includes issue and milestone (`[ULG-#][M#] ...`)
- [ ] Linear issue moved to `In Review`
- [ ] Acceptance criteria verified
